title: 16cm Mum Teddy Bear Holding A Heart With Mum Written On It - Heart Teddy For Mum - Mothers Day - Birthday Gift For Mum - I Love You Teddy Bear (Pink)
features: DIMENSIONS: Adorable teddy bear measures 16 centimetres in height, perfect for displaying on a shelf or bedside table

DESIGN FEATURES: Plush teddy bear holding a decorative heart with 'Mum' text, creating a heartwarming display of affection. This teddy comes with high quality materials and pink stitching, this bear will be loved for years to come.
GIFTING OCCASIONS: Ideal for Mother's Day, birthdays, or any special occasion to show appreciation for mum. Wonderful gift on its own or part of a hamper for Mother's Day or for a baby shower!
SENTIMENTAL VALUE: Sweet keepsake that serves as a lasting reminder of your love and gratitude. Give your mum something she will truly treasure.
PRESENTATION: Charming teddy bear with soft, cuddly texture and detailed stitching for a quality finish. Super soft and very special - this sweet beige bear is holding a love heart, just for Mum!
description: Product description Express your love and gratitude to your mum with this charming 16cm teddy bear, a heartfelt gift that's perfect for Mother's Day or her birthday. This adorable plush companion features a sweet design with the bear holding a heart emblazoned with 'Mum', making it a touching symbol of your affection. The soft, cuddly texture and endearing appearance make this teddy bear a delightful keepsake that will bring a smile to your mother's face. Standing at 16 centimetres tall, this teddy bear is the ideal size for display on a bedside table, shelf, or desk. Whether it's for Mother's Day, her birthday, or simply to show your appreciation, this lovable teddy bear serves as a constant reminder of your love and thoughtfulness. The classic design and quality craftsmanship ensure this heartwarming gift will be treasured for years to come. Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 3 years
